details.test: Task 1: Register cheapest weekday evening beginner salsa under max price

Task 3: Buy best-value class package within budget
Task 4: Book first available beginner hip-hop trial with highly rated instructor
Task 5: Create Monday/Wednesday evening schedule with non-overlapping classes
Task 7: Join waitlist for Friday 7pm intermediate contemporary
Task 8: Ask via contact form about canceling 3 hours before class
Task 9: Request info about Wedding First Dance 5 x 60-minute package
